generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT occupancy sensor embedded in physical building providing real-time occupancy status data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT environmental sensor measuring temperature and humidity levels in building zones"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT light sensor measuring ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingManagementSystem : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Central Building Management System collecting aggregated operational data from building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BmsDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance BmsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingManagementSystem
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StaticBimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Foundational Building Information Model representing building geometry, topology, and component relationships"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance DynamicRuntimeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering generated runtime model enabling real-time synchronization with physical data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance SensorMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extracted sensor metadata including tenant IDs, device endpoints, and calibration data from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, BmsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed real-time data from IoT devices and Building Automation Systems including environmental conditions and occupancy status"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, BmsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler, UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance ControlLogicMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Embedded control logic metadata defining device configurations, sensor endpoints, and middleware settings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorMetadata
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for real-time data ingestion and edge connectivity between physical sensors and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedCommissioningService, DataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedCommissioningService, ControlLogicService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for rich, interactive 3D visualization of building operations and performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework for predictive analytics and optimization of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodologies for automated transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTransformationService, DeploymentService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service showing real-time building performance metrics via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDashboardInsight, EnergyConsumptionInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing forecasts for maintenance needs, energy savings, and occupancy trends using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceForecastInsight, EnergySavingsInsight, OccupancyTrendInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service dynamically optimizing lighting and energy systems based on real-time sensor data and occupancy predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationRecommendationAction
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven service for seamless device configuration and bidirectional communication with building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling 'what-if' analysis through digital replicas of building systems (HVAC, lighting)"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationScenarioInsight
]

instance ModelTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating the transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts for deployment"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeArtifactAction
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling automated provisioning of digital twin services with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentConfigurationAction
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing real-time data ingestion from IoT devices and Building Automation Systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionAction
]

instance ControlLogicService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing bidirectional control logic between digital twin and physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlSignalAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard showing current energy consumption, occupancy patterns, and system health metrics"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of energy consumption across building systems with breakdown by component"
]

instance MaintenanceForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance forecasts based on historical and real-time operational data"
]

instance EnergySavingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted energy savings potential from optimized building operations"
]

instance OccupancyTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted occupancy patterns for space utilization optimization"
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning derived policies suggesting adjustments to lighting/HVAC setpoints"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation and deployment of device configurations based on BIM-centric control logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationScenarioInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Digital replica analysis results showing potential outcomes of operational scenario changes"
]

instance RuntimeArtifactAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generated runtime artifacts ready for deployment to digital twin infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeploymentConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated configuration and deployment of digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataIngestionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time ingestion and processing of sensor telemetry from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlSignalAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bidirectional control signals between digital twin and physical building actuators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for adjusting lighting levels based on digital twin commands"
]

instance HvacDamperActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator controlling airflow based on optimization recommendations from digital twin"
]

instance MotorizedBlindsActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adaptive window control system adjusting natural light intake based on occupancy and lighting conditions"
]

instance ReinforcementLearningController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning based controller for adaptive building system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlSignalAction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interactions involve **bidirectional command execution** from the DT to the physical system, leveraging the same middleware stack (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time synchronization. The DT generates control outputs such as:
  - **Actuator commands** (e.g., dimming lights, adjusting HVAC setpoints) via standardized APIs.
  - **Reinforcement learning-based control policies** (as in BOREALIS) dynamically optimizing energy consumption and visual comfort.
  - **Automated alerts** (e.g., maintenance triggers, occupancy-based adjustments).
  These interactions are enabled by **model-to-text transformations** that generate runtime interfaces (e.g., RESTful APIs, WebSocket endpoints) from enriched BIM models, ensuring low-latency execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the physical and virtual systems, ensuring continuous alignment of the DT with operational data. The framework supports **low-latency data exchange** via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling near-instantaneous updates to the virtual twin. While specific latency metrics are not detailed, the emphasis is on **real-time interaction** for monitoring, control, and decision-making. Optimization services (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) operate on a **dynamic time scale**, adapting control policies iteratively based on sensor feedback."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **layered, service-oriented architecture** that orchestrates the interaction between physical assets, virtual models, and operational services. Key components include:
  - **BIM models** as the semantic backbone for device modeling and control logic.
  - **Middleware (Hono/Ditto)** for real-time data exchange and synchronization.
  - **Visualization layer (Unreal Engine)** for immersive monitoring and simulation.
  - **Extension points** for integrating custom services (e.g., analytics, optimization) via modular plugins.
  The architecture supports **bidirectional communication** and **runtime configuration management**, enabling dynamic adaptation of the DT to evolving operational requirements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the following life cycle stages of the physical building:
  1. **Design phase**: Leverages BIM models to create static digital representations of the building’s geometry, components, and relationships.
  2. **Construction phase**: Integrates **as-built data** and **sensor calibrations** to refine the DT’s fidelity during installation.
  3. **Operational phase**: Enables real-time synchronization with **live sensor data** and **control systems**, supporting adaptive management (e.g., BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning).
  4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: Facilitates **digital-as-built updates** and **retroactive twinning** of modified systems (e.g., adding new sensors or actuators).
  The DT covers representations from **as-designed (ideal)** to **as-operated**, with dynamic updates to reflect physical changes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are assessed using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the alignment between the virtual and physical systems. The framework ensures **real-time synchronization** and **bidirectional communication** to minimize semantic drift. Validation is performed through:
  - **Automated data acquisition** and normalization from BIM models.
  - **Real-time monitoring** of physical-to-virtual and virtual-to-physical interactions.
  - **Case study evaluations** (e.g., Living Lab deployments) to demonstrate the DT’s operational effectiveness. While uncertainty modeling and A/B testing are not explicitly mentioned, the emphasis is on **consistency and interoperability** through standardized extension points and modular architectures."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and the DT is established using **Eclipse Hono** for edge connectivity and **Eclipse Ditto** for digital twin management. These tools provide standardized protocols for real-time data exchange, ensuring seamless integration between physical sensors/actuators and the virtual twin. The framework does not specify low-level protocols like MQTT or AMQP but relies on **Hono’s IoT connectivity** and **Ditto’s digital twin management** to facilitate bidirectional communication. Network architectures are designed for **scalability and interoperability**, supporting heterogeneous data sources."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed using a **modular, service-oriented architecture** with standardized extension points, enabling scalable and reproducible setups. The framework automates the deployment process, reducing manual intervention and ensuring consistency across projects. While specific technologies like Docker or Kubernetes are not mentioned, the focus is on **automated provisioning** of middleware (Hono/Ditto) and visualization components (Unreal Engine). The deployment pipeline is designed for **low-overhead updates** and **runtime configuration management**, supporting long-term operational adaptability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the primary standard for semantic integration and interoperability. While specific standards like IFC or COBie are not explicitly mentioned, the framework leverages BIM’s **object-based modeling** and **metadata standards** to ensure compatibility with AECO-specific systems. The use of **open-source tools (Hono, Ditto, Unreal Engine)** and **model-driven engineering (MDE)** principles further supports standardization, enabling reproducible and scalable DT deployments across projects."
]
